title: Family planning documentation
source_review_basis: full authoritative documents inspected and archived; item-level retain/rewrite/remove/add comparisons recorded

assessment.text: Requires understandable information, voluntary informed choice, client preference, consent, and freedom from coercion.
assessment.rationale: Supports voluntary contraceptive discussion where relevant.

source.title: Selected practice recommendations for contraceptive use, fourth edition
source.population: People seeking initiation, continuation, switching, or support for contraceptive method use after medical eligibility is established.
source.exclusions: Global exact guidance for informed contraceptive choice and practical method use; partial for UAE-specific law, prescribing, and full medical-eligibility assessment, which requires the companion MEC and local review. This batch also reviews method-follow-up, entered effects, and emergency-contraception sections. Eligibility, product selection, dosing, procedures and UAE availability remain clinician responsibilities. assessment.text: Supports concurrent female and male evaluation, duration trying to conceive, menstrual, obstetric, gynaecologic, medical, surgical, medication, lifestyle, sexual, STI, partner, and prior-investigation history.
assessment.rationale: Supports fertility history only when seeking pregnancy is entered.

source.title: Guideline for the prevention, diagnosis and treatment of infertility
source.population: Individuals and couples being evaluated and managed for infertility.
source.setting: Primary, reproductive-health, fertility, and specialist services adaptable to national settings.
source.exclusions: Exact global guidance for infertility history, focused examination, diagnostic evaluation, and person-centred support; requires UAE adaptation and does not directly cover recurrent pregnancy loss as a separate presentation.

curation_policy: Direct full-source guideline reconstruction; every legacy item has an auditable comparison and every final clinical item retains exact source provenance.
